title: Complete employee management system
subtitle: An internal platform built by Silicon Village to simplify HR operations, unifying time tracking, attendance, payslips, invoice submission and internal communication in a single app.

context.p1: At Silicon Village, we believe technology should simplify life, not complicate it. With a distributed team of contractors, employees and interns, managing hours, documents and expenses became increasingly complex. This real need led to the creation of App Silicon.
context.highlight: The goal was clear: empower the team with precise metrics and a simplified experience, turning bureaucratic tasks into fast and efficient workflows.
context.p2: We envisioned a space where employees could manage tasks and expenses without leaving the app. Contractors and employees can log hours for different clients, detailing their day, achievements and blockers with just a few clicks.
context.p3: Beyond task management, Silicon allows fast invoice submission. Contractors have a dedicated NFe field, making the process direct and frictionless. Reimbursement requests can be submitted, approved or rejected directly in the app.
context.p4: The app adapts to each employee contract type, delivering specific features for each profile:

profiles.name: Employee
profiles.description: Attendance tracking, payslips, daily reports and reimbursements.

profiles.name: Contractor
profiles.description: Time tracking, invoice submission (NFe) and project reports.

profiles.name: Intern
profiles.description: Dedicated home screen adapted to INTERN profile.

featuresDescription: Everything the team needs for time tracking, documents and performance in one place.

features.title: Internal Communication
features.description: Direct channel between employees and HR...

mockupsDescription: Interface designed to be simple and direct, allowing any employee to use it without training.
techDescription: Mobile app built in Flutter, backoffice in Angular and full infrastructure on Firebase with Cloud Functions.
ctaTitle: Need a tailored solution for your team?
ctaDescription: We build internal systems that simplify operations and empower teams with data and speed.
